description:
Windows-native menu bar app for OpenAI Codex and Claude Code usage stats.

Win-CodexBar is a Windows-native desktop app for viewing OpenAI Codex and Claude Code usage stats from a small Tauri shell.
v0.26.0 ports upstream CodexBar 0.26 to Windows with AWS Bedrock monthly spend tracking, OpenRouter daily/weekly/monthly API key spend windows, and Moonshot / Kimi API balance parsing for international and China regions.
